name: Galactic Energy

overview.value: Galactic Energy is a Chinese private space launch enterprise founded on 6 February 2018, flying the solid-fuel Ceres-1 rocket and developing the partly reusable Pallas-1 and the enlarged Ceres-2. It conducted its first launch in November 2020, becoming the second Chinese private company to reach orbit, and its second in December 2021, becoming the first Chinese private firm to reach orbit twice.

base.reason: established aggregator, single reference (audit Phase 3 backfill, 2026-07-08)

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
